name: fix-three-editor-pane-issues-20260325-1841
idea: Fix three editor pane issues: 1) unlock pane on navigate to editor page, 2) no content shift when locking pane, 3) editor pane should be 70% when both editor+generation panes locked

overrides.note: User answers: Q1=yes (paddingTop interpretation correct). Q2=just unlock on navigate to editor, don't re-lock on leave. Q3=70% only when generations pane is LOCKED (not hover-open). Fix flag step_3: trace full height path from PanesContext through EditorPaneTab - EditorPaneTab subtracts generationsOffset again. Fix flag step_2: use generations-pane route-unlock pattern depending on both route AND live lock state. Fix flag step_1: explicitly update the test asserting content shift.

notes.note: User answers: Q1=yes (paddingTop interpretation correct). Q2=just unlock on navigate to editor, don't re-lock on leave. Q3=70% only when generations pane is LOCKED (not hover-open). Fix flag step_3: trace full height path from PanesContext through EditorPaneTab - EditorPaneTab subtracts generationsOffset again. Fix flag step_2: use generations-pane route-unlock pattern depending on both route AND live lock state. Fix flag step_1: explicitly update the test asserting content shift.

last_gate.rationale: All three significant flags from iteration 1 are resolved. Weighted score dropped from 4.0 to 0. The plan now correctly addresses the double-subtraction height chain, the hydration race condition, and the test update gap. No open flags remain.
last_gate.signals_assessment: Iteration 2. Score trajectory 4.0 → 0, clean resolution. Plan delta 76.8% reflects substantial rework to address both correctness flags — appropriate for a first revision, not churn. Zero recurring critiques. All preflight checks pass. No scope creep detected.
warnings: Step 3's removal of generationsOffset subtraction in EditorPaneTab may affect the pane's slide-in animation positioning — executor should verify the pane still anchors correctly at the top of the viewport.

Step 4's test update for 'effective heights remain stable across visibility toggle' requires careful rewrite — the old test encoded buggy behavior, so the new assertions must match the corrected height-chain semantics.

settled_decisions.decision: Editor pane is position:fixed overlay — paddingTop for editor lock is always wrong and should be removed unconditionally.
settled_decisions.rationale: Confirmed in iteration 1, carried forward. EditorPaneTab.tsx:138 uses position:fixed;top:0.

settled_decisions.decision: Unlock on navigate persists lock=false to DB, not just visual hide.
settled_decisions.rationale: Confirmed in iteration 1. The bug is that lock persists in DB.

settled_decisions.decision: 70% editor height applies only when generations pane is LOCKED, not hover-open.
settled_decisions.rationale: User explicitly answered Q3: only locked. Use locks.gens, not generationsVisible.

settled_decisions.decision: Remove double-subtraction by making PanesContext visibility-aware and removing generationsOffset subtraction in EditorPaneTab.
settled_decisions.rationale: This was the core fix for flag step_3. The context now handles compression correctly, making the secondary subtraction in EditorPaneTab redundant and harmful.

settled_decisions.decision: Route-unlock effect must depend on both location.pathname AND isEditorPaneLocked for hydration safety.
settled_decisions.rationale: Core fix for flag step_2, following the proven pattern from useGenerationsPaneController.ts:234-238.

last_gate.orchestrator_guidance: Plan passed gate and preflight. Proceed to finalize.
